## Problem

Clients leave initial feedback but cannot reply to existing comment threads. Conversation fragments across WhatsApp and the dashboard.

## Proposal

Allow clients to reply to existing feedback comments on the preview overlay. Show threaded replies in the developer dashboard.

## Layer

Cloud

## Notes

Agency workflow improvement. Part of [ROADMAP v0.2](https://github.com/ship-local/shiplocal/blob/main/ROADMAP.md).
